title: ValidateResponse
description: Response body for POST /validate. Carries the canonical PublishedRecord plus a per-tier comparison of the client's hashes against canonical, plus targeted where-to-find hints for the fields the client is missing or that mismatched.

record.description: The canonical published record for this ISIN, identical to what GET /hash/{isin} returns.

match.description: True iff the client's hashes agree with canonical at the highest tier the client sent. False if any sent tier diverges.

highest_tier_compared.description: Highest tier present in BOTH client and canonical. null if no overlap.

match.description: true = hashes agree, false = hashes diverge, null = not compared (client did not send this tier).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation when match is null or false.

missing_for_higher_tiers.description: Fields the client did not present that would have allowed a higher-tier comparison.

mismatched_at_tier.description: Lowest tier at which client and canonical hashes diverged, if any.

fields_implicated_by_mismatch.description: Fields introduced at the mismatching tier (the candidates for what is wrong on the client's side).

where_to_find.description: Targeted where-to-find hints for fields in missing_for_higher_tiers and fields_implicated_by_mismatch.

warnings.description: Human-readable warnings derived from structural_flags (e.g. 'bond is a sinker — your engine must apply the sinker schedule').
